microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and **self-service scheduling capabilities** that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model across cloud network environments.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a **rack-level drill program** in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation model aligned to enterprise SLA and uptime requirements.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating across security, networking, and cloud infrastructure teams.

Scaled team leverage through AI-driven automation, building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows to **reduce planning cycle time by 39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%, enabling faster response to customer network performance events.

Acted as cross-functional technical advisor bridging product management, engineering, and enterprise customer stakeholders, translating complex **cloud network resilience** requirements into actionable solution designs and executive-ready outcome narratives.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows, delivering tailored demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly through optimized developer tooling.

Shaped the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by conducting **11+ structured user interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating technical feedback into prioritized requirements for engineering.

Improved data retrieval and solution discoverability by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform with rigorous metadata standards, cutting average lookup time by 83% across internal technical teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams across cloud networking and infrastructure.

Mobilized a product strategy to reduce WAN/LAN operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap to automate critical network provisioning paths.

Enabled leadership to target automation gaps across **140+ service teams** by engineering a Power BI dashboard that tracked operational toil, surfaced high-impact support bottlenecks, and informed prioritization of network and infrastructure improvements.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping endpoint dependencies across 1,200+ stations spanning Windows and Linux environments critical to warehouse network continuity.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **resolving 40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process to maintain deployment velocity across robotics network infrastructure.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% and reducing manual intervention across distributed endpoint environments.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals through a redesigned CRM process, improving sales cycle efficiency and customer relationship visibility.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google Business profile to improve top-of-funnel performance.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying and closing margin leaks that had been obscured by inconsistent cost-tracking across service lines.

Built client-facing proposal templates and technical solution summaries that translated service capabilities into **clear business value**, enabling field reps to handle objections and close deals faster across diverse customer segments.

Used 'SASE architecture' and 'cloud network resilience' in microsoft_ft bullets #5 and #6 to directly mirror the JD's SASE familiarity requirement and customer technical advisor framing.
Injected 'Windows and Linux environments' and 'endpoint dependencies' into amazon_robotics bullet #1 to surface the JD's explicit Endpoint OS (Windows, macOS, Linux) requirement.
Used 'network provisioning paths' and 'WAN/LAN operational toil' in microsoft_2022 bullets to align with JD requirements around WAN/LAN architecture and network engineering experience.
Framed microsoft_2023 bullet #1 around 'demos and training sessions' to mirror the JD's core responsibility of conducting product demonstrations and technical presentations to stakeholders.
Added a pro_painters bullet #4 on translating service capabilities into business value to directly echo the JD requirement: 'ability to translate technical features into business benefits.'
